title: conyza laxa
intro: Conyza laxa, also known as horseweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Conyza laxa include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions like eczema. The herbal preparations of Conyza laxa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine.
